sections.paragraph:
ἀστομάχητος, ον (στομαχικός ‘of the stomach’, ‘with stomach disorder’; Alciphron 4, 17, 2; CIG 6647; PBad II, 35, 17 [87 a.d.]) lit. of one who does not have a disorder in the stomach; metaph. not easily angered (w. μακρόθυμος) Hv 1, 2, 3 (on the association of emotive aspect with inner bodily parts, s. ἄσπλαγχνος).—DELG s.v. στόμα.

CIG CIG = Corpus Inscriptionum Graecarum—List 3

PBad PBad = Veröffentlichungen aus der badischen Papyrussammlungen—List 4

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

metaph. metaph. = metaphor(ically)

Hv Hv = Visions

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 145
